description:
A user interface screenshot displaying a "Data Catalogue" table within the CLC+ Core system, listing various land monitoring data assets. The table is structured with columns: "EAGLE Approved" (empty for all visible entries), "Name", "Type", "Created At", "Created By", "Country", "Region", "Reference Year", "Time Range", "Organisation/s", "Contact Person", "Status", and "INSPIRE Themes".

The table lists 10 entries (21-30 of 41 total items displayed, showing 10 items per page):
